behavior_summary: This script implements the in-world behavior for door items: describing them when inspected, handling player 'U8P_DOOR_NS::use' attempts, and responding to hits by mapping certain strikes into a U8P_DOOR_NS::use/open attempt.

U8P_DOOR_NS::look delegates to a lock/type-aware check (U8P_DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked) that emits a short description: 'Locked Door' when the item's quality has the lock bit, otherwise 'door' or 'tower door' depending on item type.

U8P_DOOR_NS::use (process) simply forwards to U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor, which enforces locked/blocked checks, emits user-facing barks ('Locked Door' or 'blocked') when appropriate, and invokes swing/type-change helpers (U8P_DOOR_NS::calculateDoorSwing and U8P_DOOR_NS::func0340) to animate/open the door via FREE::changeItemType.

Hit handling funnels through U8P_DOOR_NS::gotHit -> U8P_DOOR_NS::func0C82 which filters hits (e.g., attacker anim set check) and may call U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor so certain attack types can open or break doors.

Utilities like U8P_DOOR_NS::func05E4, U8P_DOOR_NS::func0886 and quality/type reads (Item::getQuality, Item::getType, Item::getFrame) are used to detect paired doors, orientation/flip bits, lock state, and to compute the correct frame/type and coordinates for the engine call FREE::changeItemType.
notable_control_flow: U8P_DOOR_NS::look -> calls U8P_DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked and always suspends after emitting one short bark; lock bit (quality & 0x0400) takes precedence and yields 'Locked Door'.

U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor first checks for alternate/paired door context via U8P_DOOR_NS::func05E4, then uses U8P_DOOR_NS::func0886 to test a 'locked-like' condition; when param1 == 0x01 (player-initiated), locked or blocked results produce barks and suspend.

Swing computation path: U8P_DOOR_NS::calculateDoorSwing and U8P_DOOR_NS::func0340 compute new frame/type and call FREE::changeItemType; their boolean result controls whether U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor reports 'blocked' and whether avatar stasis/animation adjustments occur.

Hit-to-U8P_DOOR_NS::use mapping in U8P_DOOR_NS::func0C82: proceeds only when param1 == 0x01, U8P_DOOR_NS::func0886(this) == 0, Npc::getLastAnimSet(copyOfParam1) == 0x3A, and the door lacks the 0x0100 quality bit; then it calls U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor.
open_questions: Exact semantics of param1 passed to U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor — it is treated as a selector/actor flag (0x01 triggers player-facing barks) but its full set of values and callers isn't fully enumerated.
Precise meanings of quality flags beyond observed bits (0x0400 -> lock, 0x0100 / 0x0200 used for pairing/orientation) and how they map to in-game editor flags.
Edge cases and return values from FREE::changeItemType (how non-success is reported back to the script) are inferred but not fully confirmed.

Whether U8P_DOOR_NS::func0340 and U8P_DOOR_NS::calculateDoorSwing always call FREE::changeItemType or if they sometimes modify internal state without a map update (some conditional branches were low-confidence).

main_function.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player's 'U8P_DOOR_NS::look' / inspect action for a door item by emitting a short description that reflects lock state and door subtype.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player inspects or 'looks at' the door item.
Runs in the item's process context (implicit 'this' refers to the door item).

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::look
function_map.role: Top-level 'U8P_DOOR_NS::look' process that delegates to lock/type-aware description logic.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked
function_map.role: Determines lock bit and door subtype to emit one-line barks ('Locked Door', 'door', 'tower door').

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::use
function_map.role: Process entry for 'U8P_DOOR_NS::use' action; delegates to U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor
function_map.role: Primary handler for activation/U8P_DOOR_NS::use: enforces locked/blocked checks, orchestrates swing computation and calls frame/type-change routines; emits 'blocked'/'Locked Door' barks when needed.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::gotHit
function_map.role: Process invoked when the door is hit; forwards impact parameters to U8P_DOOR_NS::func0C82 for filtering/handling.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::func0C82
function_map.role: Filters incoming hit events (by param, attacker anim set, and door quality) and maps qualifying hits into U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::calculateDoorSwing
function_map.role: Compute the new frame/type/encoding and coordinates required when the door swings; prepares args and calls FREE::changeItemType.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::func0340
function_map.role: Coordinate-aware variant of swing/type-change logic that reads X/Y/Z and applies FREE::changeItemType for the actual map update.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::func05E4
function_map.role: Searches for/returns a paired/neighbor door item based on type/quality and coordinate adjacency; used by U8P_DOOR_NS::useDoor to attempt alternate swings.

function_map.name: U8P_DOOR_NS::func0886
function_map.role: Small predicate that inspects Item::getQuality(this) and returns a boolean-like indicator (used as a locked/blocked test).

function_map.name: Item::getQuality
function_map.role: Engine API: read item quality/flags (used for lock/orientation tests).

function_map.name: Item::getType
function_map.role: Engine API: read item type id (used to choose door subtype handling).

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Engine API: read current item frame index for computing new frame offsets.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Engine API: read item X coordinate for coordinate-aware change calls.

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Engine API: read item Y coordinate for coordinate-aware change calls.

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Engine API: read item Z/floor coordinate for coordinate-aware change calls.

function_map.name: FREE::changeItemType
function_map.role: Engine-level call to update an item on the map (apply new frame/type and position changes).

function_map.name: Npc::getLastAnimSet
function_map.role: Engine API: used to inspect an attacker's last animation set as a filter for hit-handling.

internal_calls.purpose: Delegate U8P_DOOR_NS::look/inspect description generation (lock/type-aware one-line bark).
Forward the 'U8P_DOOR_NS::use' process to the main U8P_DOOR_NS::use handler.
Dispatch hit parameters to a hit-filtering/handling helper.
Convert a qualifying hit into a U8P_DOOR_NS::use/open attempt on the door.
Query for a paired/neighbor door to attempt alternate swing/change if primary attempt fails.
Test 'locked/blocked' condition on item(s) to decide whether to emit 'Locked Door' bark and abort when param1==0x01.
Compute and attempt the swing/open change; its boolean result drives blocked/animation logic.
Coordinate-aware application of the computed swing/change (calls FREE::changeItemType).
Related swing/apply logic (U8P_DOOR_NS::func0340 is a coordinate-aware variant called in similar flows).

external_calls.purpose: Read the lock bit (observed 0x0400) to decide whether to bark 'Locked Door'.
Distinguish door subtypes (e.g., 0x44/0x45) to choose between 'door' and 'tower door' descriptions.
Read current frame(s) to compute frame-offset components for the new swung frame index.
Branch on door type to choose offsets and target type ids for change operations.
Obtain X coordinate for coordinate-aware change calls.
Obtain Y coordinate for coordinate-aware change calls.
Obtain Z (floor) for change calls passed to FREE::changeItemType.
Apply the computed frame/type change to the map item to effect opening/closing animation or replacement.
Inspect the attacker's last animation set to filter which hits (anim set 0x3A observed) may trigger door U8P_DOOR_NS::use behavior.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements the in-world behavior for door items: describing them when inspected, handling player 'U8P_DOOR_NS::use' attempts, and responding to hits by mapping certain strikes into a U8P_DOOR_NS::use/open attempt.
